mapper.select: select pm.project_id, pm.user_id, pm.role, pm.joined_at, su.user_name, su.nick_name, su.avatar from project_member pm left join sys_user su on su.user_id = pm.user_id where pm.project_id = #{projectId} and pm.user_id = #{userId} limit 1

select pm.project_id, pm.user_id, pm.role, pm.joined_at, su.user_name, su.nick_name, su.avatar from project_member pm left join sys_user su on su.user_id = pm.user_id where pm.project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert: insert into project_member (project_id, user_id, role, joined_at) values (#{projectId}, #{userId}, #{role}, now())
mapper.update: update project_member set role = #{role} where project_id = #{projectId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from project_member where project_id = #{projectId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from project_member where project_id = #{projectId} and role = 'admin'
select count(*) from project_member where project_id = #{projectId}
